 On 3/4/12 5:52 AM, Jan Henrik Sylvester wrote:
 > Yes, the current port compiles fine without databases/gdbm and 
 > net-mgmt/net-snmp installed,
 
 Ok, now I understand what you are talking about.
 
 let me put it into a tinderbox, and force it to install gdbm and 
 net-snmp and send you a test port for you to verify I fixed what I broke.
